title: Linear: Full Stack Engineer
text:
Headquarters:  Remote
      URL:   https://linear.app 
 

 Linear is building the next generation of project management tooling. We're looking for a full stack engineer to work on our core product across the entire stack.   4+ years of full stack development experience  Proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and React  Experience with PostgreSQL and GraphQL  

  To apply:   https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/linear-full-stack-engineer
